title: Pooch Pack
description: The Pooch Pack is ready to serve when you need a hand, always promoting values of friendship and teamwork.
altHero: The Pooch Pack, four dogs using various modes of transport, with a kid on an ATV
alt1: dog in a spacesuit by a woman whose cat is stuck up a tree
alt2: a concerned cat in a tree
alt3: the young boy wearing a helmet and standing by a ladder
